basic_details.job_title: ICMR NIHR Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Health Research (ICMR NIHR)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Health Research (ICMR NIHR) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Health Research is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 1 Project Research Scientist – II (Non- Medical) posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: As per norms for SC/ST, OBC, EWS, Ex-Servicemen, Departmental Candidates, and Retrenched Government Employees.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Clinical Psychology / Cognitive & Neuroscience / Psychology / Public Health / Psychiatric Social Work / Sociology / Microbiology / Biochemistry / Epidemiology with 3 years' post-qualification experience OR Postgraduate degree in Clinical Psychology / Cognitive & Neuroscience / Psychology / Public Health / Psychiatric Social Work / Sociology / Microbiology / Biochemistry / Epidemiology with PhD.

content_sections.heading: ICMR NIHR Project Research Scientist – II (Non- Medical) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ICMR NIHR Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ICMR NIHR Project Research Scientist – II (Non- Medical) Job 2026 Notification PDF

Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Postgraduate degree in Clinical Psychology / Cognitive & Neuroscience / Psychology / Public Health / Psychiatric Social Work / Sociology / Microbiology / Biochemistry / Epidemiology with 3 years' post-qualification experience. OR Postgraduate degree in Clinical Psychology / Cognitive & Neuroscience / Psychology / Public Health / Psychiatric Social Work / Sociology / Microbiology / Biochemistry / Epidemiology with PhD.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ICMR NIHR Project Research Scientist – II (Non- Medical) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Project Research Scientist – II (Non- Medical).

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Research Scientist – II (Non- Medical) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs.67,000/- + HRA per month (Consolidated).

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: A Postgraduate degree in specified fields with 3 years of experience or a PhD in the same fields is required.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for this position?
faq.answer: The age limit is not exceeding 40 years, with relaxations applicable as per norms.

faq.question: Q7. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 20 July 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview venue is at Jodhpur, Pincode 342005.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original certificates, a set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, and a duly filled application form if applicable.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.
